name: The Hundred Youkai Master
developer: 株式会社ワンコネクト
publisher: 株式会社ワンコネクト
short_description: Lead 100 yokai in this hardcore tactical RPG. No grinding, no fluff—pure strategy and brutal battles.
detailed_description:
The Hundred Youkai Master

A tactical command RPG featuring over 100 yokai.
Form your ultimate Hyakki Yagyō, master deep strategy, and conquer deadly encounters!
Challenge yourself in a battle-focused, high-difficulty RPG—no exploration, just pure tactics.

Designed for players seeking high-difficulty and challenging battles.

A powerless onmyoji leads a hundred yokai into battle—

"Hyakuyoushi" is a command-based strategy RPG with a deep tactical core.

Follow Sei, a young onmyoji who has lost her spiritual power, and the twin nine-tailed foxes Kuro and Shiro, as they embark on a journey to reclaim her lost arts.

A girl without onmyō arts—Haru.

Without pacts nor mystical talent,

she faced the youkai simply as a friend.

Behind her carefree smile lies a will stronger than any spell.

Now, with a hundred allies at her side,

the false onmyōji tears through the darkness.

Dōman, the archenemy who cursed Haru’s master to death.

A genius of orthodox onmyō arts,

he tramples youkai with elegance and cruelty.

To him, battle is beauty—and mockery, his art.

For Haru, this "embodiment of curses" stands as the ultimate wall she must break.

■ Game Overview

Choose 4 yokai from a pool of 100, each with their own attributes, skills, and combo techniques, to form your ultimate party.

All yokai can grow strong with proper training—build your own unbeatable Hyakki Yagyō!

Combat is turn-based and highly strategic.

Victory hinges on skill order, buffs/debuffs, formation choices, and resource management.

With no exploration or mini-games, this title focuses entirely on combat, delivering a fast-paced and concentrated tactical experience.

■ Key Features

・100 yokai to recruit and battle with!

　A limitless variety of team compositions and strategies based on skills, elements, and synergy.

・Deep, strategic command-based combat

　Skill sequencing, formation tactics, and buff/debuff timing all matter.

・Permanent growth system

　Monsters gain strength through battle and fusing duplicates (Yōryoku Unleashing).

　Equip powerful gear to your favorite yokai to bring out their full potential!

・Temporary growth mechanics

　Relics and Yokai Seals grant temporary boosts within quests. Use them wisely for speed runs and high-level tactics!

・Multiple playstyles supported

　Whether you prefer brute strength through training or efficient runs via tactical buffs—the choice is yours.

■ Combat System

・Turn-based command battle (no grid movement)

・Each yokai has multiple unique skills

・Skills consume cost points—plan your turns and resource usage carefully

・Combining skill order, buffs, and combo attacks changes the tide of battle

■ Game Details

・Playable yokai: 100

・Save system: Manual and auto-save supported

・Languages: Japanese / English / Simplified Chinese

・Mode: Single-player only / Full controller support

・Difficulty: No difficulty setting (stages increase in challenge over time)

■ Recommended For Players Who:

・Enjoy character growth and tactical depth

・Want to raise and use their favorite units long-term

・Prefer fast-paced battles without interruptions

・Like focusing on strategy over exploration

・Love Japanese folklore, yokai, and onmyoji themes

・For those seeking high difficulty and challenging battles
